description: Generate a full presentation slide (title + content + visuals) or a visual-only figure from a natural-language prompt, using Nano Banana Pro via the OpenRouter API with smart quality-gated iteration.
rules: calls the OpenRouter API — requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env
VISUAL_ONLY=1 yields just the figure (PPT workflow); empty/0 yields a full slide (PDF workflow)
usage: Set PROMPT (slide description); optionally VISUAL_ONLY=1. Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: slide.png.
limitation: Network + paid API. Offline or without OPENROUTER_API_KEY the porter writes a stub report instead of a real image. Capped at 2 refinement iterations.

vars.PROMPT: Title: Introduction to ML\nKey points: supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement
